question: Aura-board 보드/섹션 실시간 동기화 엔진으로 Liveblocks(SaaS), Yjs(CRDT self-host), 자체 WS(Node ws/socket.io) 중 무엇이 갤럭시 탭 S6 Lite 교실 환경과 T0-① 채널 격리 요건에 가장 적합한가?

adopt_if: cold-start prototype boots with 1 room + 2 tabs echoing card-move events
payload per card-move event ≤ 2KB on wire
JS heap on boot ≤ 40MB in prototype (tablet performance budget proxy)
channel isolation (board vs section) implementable with ≤ 1 day of engine-specific glue
estimated monthly cost at 30 classrooms × 30 students ≤ USD 50 OR fully self-host with no per-seat fee
T0-③ WebSocket protocol task can proceed immediately with chosen engine docs
reject_if: prototype fails to run within 10 min on WSL2 localhost
license or pricing model forces vendor lock-in with no exit path

scope_boundary: 1 board + 3~5 cards + 2~3 browser tabs echo server. Production persistence/auth/presence UI are out of scope. WSL2 does not allow real 30-tablet tests — Playwright headless + literature data replaces it.
perf_baseline_device: Samsung Galaxy Tab S6 Lite, Chrome Android
